<!-- Generated by AI on 05/04/2026 -->

# Technical Stack

## Backend

application_framework: ASP.NET Core 10 Web API (.NET 10)
database_system: Azure Table Storage (in-memory fallback when connection string is absent)
authentication: Azure App Service EasyAuth (Azure AD) — local and test environments bypass auth via custom handler

## Frontend

javascript_framework: React 19
import_strategy: node (Vite 7 / npm 11)
css_framework: MUI v6 (via Paycor Design System)
ui_component_library: Paycor Design System (@paycor/design-system, built on @mui/material)
data_fetching: TanStack Query v5 (@tanstack/react-query)
routing: React Router v7
fonts_provider: Google Fonts (Roboto — bundled via MUI defaults)
icon_library: @mui/icons-material

## Hosting & Infrastructure

application_hosting: Azure App Service
database_hosting: Azure Table Storage (Azure Storage Account)
asset_hosting: Served as static files from ASP.NET Core wwwroot (compiled Vite output)
deployment_solution: GitHub Actions CI/CD to Azure App Service

## Repository

code_repository_url: https://github.com/beingdk/AntarMindAI

## Development Environment

local_api_port_http: 5100
local_api_port_https: 7100
local_frontend_dev_server: Vite dev server (proxies /api/* to https://localhost:7100)
auth_bypass_environments: Development, Testing (uses hardcoded LocalDevCurrentUserService)
connection_string_env_var: AZURE_TABLE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING (empty = in-memory store)
